ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., NN, Tree, SVM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the model for better categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the dataset for better categorization and search */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model version (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the model version for better categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset version (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the dataset version for better categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the evaluation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the evaluation (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  "evaluation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the evaluation, such as the evaluation environment or specific metrics used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data_scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the user for better categorization and search */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., model_training, evaluation, dataset_upload) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client performing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being shared */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the model */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the model */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing event (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the sharing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the dataset */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the dataset */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing event (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the sharing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sharing_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collab_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., discussion, code review) */,
  "collab_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collaboration was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "collab_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., discussion, data cleaning) */,
  "collab_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collaboration was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, diagnostics) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reports_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quality, distribution) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_reports_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
